routing.guidance: Selects an operating-metric-first proof style close to mechanism.

boundary.guidance: Slightly centers scope on the parts of the system that emit usable operating data.

structure.guidance: Encourages mechanism claims that map directly to behavior, throughput, retention, and unit economics.

scenarios.guidance: Prefers scenarios that can be distinguished by operational metrics moving first.

question_generation.guidance: Favors questions about which metric moves first if the thesis is right or wrong.

evidence_planning.guidance: Sets KPI hierarchy, proxy tolerance, and conflict handling around operating metrics.

decision_logic.guidance: Can support action when operating evidence is stronger than narrative but still incomplete.

signal_translation.guidance: Favors churn, cohorts, activation, throughput, capacity, and margin signals.

monitoring.guidance: Monitoring should track high-frequency operating metrics and deterioration or acceleration patterns.

render.guidance: Mainly affects whether the output explicitly shows KPI logic.
